metadata.name: Macro Regime Scanner sample for v0.34 scoring audit
metadata.note: Synthetic sample rows for testing the scoring engine only. Do not use as market data.
metadata.scoringNote: Scores are asset-specific evidence pressure readings, not buy/sell signals.

inputs.label: 10Y Treasury yield pressure
inputs.source: U.S. Treasury official Daily Treasury Par Yield Curve Rates

scoreAudit.label: Moderately negative live pressure

topPositiveDrivers.label: Liquidity support
topPositiveDrivers.reason: Improving liquidity/financial conditions can support broad risk appetite.

topPositiveDrivers.label: Growth / demand strength
topPositiveDrivers.reason: Better growth can support earnings unless it worsens rate pressure.

topNegativeDrivers.label: 10Y Treasury yield pressure
topNegativeDrivers.reason: Higher yield pressure can pressure equity multiples through discount-rate and financing channels.
topNegativeDrivers.source: U.S. Treasury official Daily Treasury Par Yield Curve Rates

topNegativeDrivers.label: CPI / inflation pressure
topNegativeDrivers.reason: Hot inflation can raise rate-path pressure and reduce valuation support.

topNegativeDrivers.label: Credit / financial stress
topNegativeDrivers.reason: Rising credit stress is a direct risk-off input for equities.

mainConflicts.label: Low internal evidence conflict
mainConflicts.detail: Positive scored pressure 0.92 vs negative scored pressure -3.40.

excludedEvidence.label: EIA crude inventory balance
excludedEvidence.excludedReason: Energy inventory rows are not direct equity-index evidence in this pass.

excludedEvidence.label: USDA crop balance pressure
excludedEvidence.excludedReason: No explicit asset/input mapping in v0.34; visible only unless manually mapped.

excludedEvidence.label: NOAA drought / weather hazard
excludedEvidence.excludedReason: Weather hazards are usually display-only for broad equity indices unless specifically tied to economic disruption.

caveats: This is evidence pressure, not a trade signal.
Missing or stale evidence is excluded, not treated as neutral.
U.S. macro evidence is weighted differently by asset class.
Asset-specific exceptions may require manual tuning.

scoreAudit.label: Positive live pressure

topPositiveDrivers.label: 10Y Treasury yield pressure

topPositiveDrivers.reason: Risk-off stress can support USD safe-haven demand, though pair-specific exceptions exist.
